prompt: A {argument name="art style" default="traditional Japanese Ukiyo-e woodblock print"} landscape featuring an {argument name="main character" default="anthropomorphic glass of beer with a frothy head, a happy smiling face, stick-like yellow arms and legs, and traditional sandals"} walking on a dirt path. The character holds a blue round fan displaying the kanji "{argument name="fan text" default="涼"}". The background includes a large pine tree and a wooden bridge on the right with 3 small figures crossing, plus 3 more figures walking on the path. To the left, tall reeds border a river leading to a distant {argument name="background mountain" default="snow-capped Mount Fuji"} under a gradient sky. A traditional text cartouche in the top left reads "{argument name="top left text" default="東海道 五十三次之内 由井"}" next to red artist seals, with a matching cartouche in the bottom left. The image has vintage, muted colors and authentic woodblock paper textures.

breakdown.creativeCore: Ukiyo-e Mascot Landscape：Generates a traditional Japanese woodblock print featuring a customizable mascot character in a classic Mount Fuji landscape.
breakdown.subject: 产品
breakdown.bestUse: 节日海报、城市印象、传统文化视觉、地域品牌

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: vintage]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
